presets.title: base
presets.description: Core shipped rules for the default lintai baseline.

presets.title: preview
presets.description: Preview rules that expand coverage beyond the stable baseline.

presets.title: compat
presets.description: Policy and compatibility checks that compare declared workspace posture against repository behavior.

presets.title: skills
presets.description: Rules for instruction and skills markdown that remain inside the core agent-artifact surface.

presets.title: mcp
presets.description: Rules for MCP, tool, and server JSON configs, including preview-only coverage.

presets.title: claude
presets.description: Rules for Claude settings and command-hook configuration.

presets.title: guidance
presets.description: Advice-oriented guidance rules that are useful, but intentionally not part of the core security baseline.

presets.title: governance
presets.description: Opt-in review rules for shared mutation authority and similar workflow-governance decisions that should not read like headline security findings.

presets.title: supply-chain
presets.description: Sidecar supply-chain hardening rules, including GitHub Actions workflow checks.

presets.title: strict
presets.description: Severity overlay for active security rules; it does not activate additional rules by itself.

rules.summary: Hidden HTML comment contains dangerous agent instructions

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on suspicious phrase heuristics inside hidden HTML comments.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Markdown contains remote download-and-execute instruction outside code blocks

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on prose command heuristics outside code blocks.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Hidden HTML comment contains remote download-and-execute instruction

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on hidden-comment command heuristics rather than a structural execution model.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Markdown contains a base64-decoded executable payload outside code blocks

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on prose base64-and-exec text heuristics.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Markdown instructions reference parent-directory traversal for file access

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on prose path-traversal and access-verb heuristics.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Hook script downloads remote code and executes it

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit remote download-and-execute behavior in hook shell lines, not prose text.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: HookSignals download-and-execute observation over non-comment hook lines.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Hook script appears to exfiltrate secrets through a network call

lifecycle.rationale: Matches secret-bearing network exfil behavior in executable hook lines.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: HookSignals secret exfil observation from network markers plus secret markers on non-comment lines.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: Hook script: insecure HTTP secret send
rules.summary: Hook script sends secret material to an insecure http:// endpoint

lifecycle.rationale: Matches insecure HTTP transport on a secret-bearing hook exfil path.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: HookSignals precise http:// span observation gated by concurrent secret exfil markers.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Hook script disables TLS or certificate verification for a network call

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit TLS verification bypass tokens in executable hook network context.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: HookSignals TLS-bypass token observation over parsed hook line tokens and network context.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: Hook script: hardcoded auth in network call
rules.summary: Hook script embeds static authentication material in a network call

lifecycle.rationale: Matches literal static auth material in hook URLs or authorization headers.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: HookSignals userinfo/header literal extraction excluding dynamic references.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Hook script decodes a base64 payload and executes it

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit base64 decode-and-execute behavior in executable hook lines.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: HookSignals base64-decode plus exec observation over non-comment hook lines.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: MCP configuration shells out through sh -c or bash -c

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit shell-wrapper command structure in JSON config, whether the shell is the command itself or the first launch argument.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals command and args structure observation for sh -c or bash -c wrappers, either through `command` or `args[0]`.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Configuration contains an insecure http:// endpoint

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit insecure http:// endpoints in configuration values.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals precise http:// endpoint span resolution from parsed JSON location map.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: MCP configuration passes through credential environment variables

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit credential env passthrough by key inside configuration env maps.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals env-map key observation for credential passthrough keys.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Configuration disables TLS or certificate verification

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit TLS or certificate verification disable flags in configuration.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals boolean and key observation for trust-verification disable settings.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Configuration embeds static authentication material in a connection or auth value

lifecycle.rationale: Matches literal static auth material embedded directly in configuration values.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals literal authorization or userinfo span extraction excluding dynamic placeholders.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: JSON configuration description contains override-style hidden instructions

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on descriptive-field phrase heuristics in JSON text.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Configuration forwards sensitive environment variable references

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on sensitive env-name heuristics in forwarded references.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Configuration points at a suspicious remote endpoint

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on suspicious host-marker heuristics for remote endpoints.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, a non-heuristic graduation basis, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Heuristic preview rule; not a stable contract and may evolve as false-positive tuning improves.

rules.summary: Configuration commits literal secret material in env, auth, or header values

lifecycle.rationale: Matches literal secret material committed into env, header, or auth-like JSON fields.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals literal secret observation over env, header, and auth-like keys excluding dynamic placeholders.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Configuration endpoint targets a metadata or private-network host literal

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit metadata-service or private-network host literals in endpoint-like configuration values.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals endpoint-host extraction over URL-like endpoint fields with metadata/private-host classification.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Cursor plugin manifest contains an unsafe absolute or parent-traversing path

lifecycle.rationale: Matches absolute or parent-traversing paths in committed Cursor plugin manifest path fields.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals plugin-manifest path observation limited to known plugin path fields.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Markdown contains committed private key material

lifecycle.rationale: Matches explicit committed private-key PEM markers inside agent markdown surfaces.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: MarkdownSignals private-key marker observation across parsed markdown regions excluding placeholder examples.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: Shell example: remote content piped to shell
rules.summary: Fenced shell example pipes remote content directly into a shell

lifecycle.blocker: Depends on fenced shell-example command heuristics and still needs broader external precision review.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, external usefulness evidence, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural preview rule; deterministic today, but the preview contract may still evolve.

rules.summary: MCP-style tool descriptor is missing required machine fields

lifecycle.rationale: Checks unambiguous MCP-style tool descriptors for missing machine fields instead of relying on prose heuristics.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ToolJsonSignals MCP collection analysis over parsed tool descriptor JSON.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: MCP-style tool descriptor collection contains duplicate tool names

lifecycle.rationale: Checks structured MCP-style tool collections for duplicate names that can shadow one another.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ToolJsonSignals duplicate-name detection over MCP-style tool collections.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: OpenAI strict schema: missing additionalProperties false
rules.summary: OpenAI strict tool schema omits recursive additionalProperties: false

lifecycle.rationale: Checks OpenAI strict tool schemas for recursive object locking with additionalProperties: false.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ToolJsonSignals recursive schema walk over OpenAI function.parameters when strict mode is enabled.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: OpenAI strict schema: properties not all required
rules.summary: OpenAI strict tool schema does not require every declared property

lifecycle.rationale: Checks OpenAI strict tool schemas for full required coverage of declared properties.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ToolJsonSignals recursive required-versus-properties comparison over strict OpenAI schemas.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: Anthropic strict schema: missing additionalProperties false
rules.summary: Anthropic strict tool input schema omits additionalProperties: false

lifecycle.rationale: Checks Anthropic strict tool input_schema objects for explicit additionalProperties: false.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ToolJsonSignals recursive schema walk over Anthropic input_schema when strict mode is enabled.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: server.json remotes: insecure or private URL
rules.summary: server.json remotes entry uses an insecure or non-public remote URL

lifecycle.rationale: Checks MCP registry remotes[] URLs for insecure HTTP and non-public host literals without inspecting local package transport URLs.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ServerJsonSignals remotes[] URL analysis limited to streamable-http and sse entries.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: server.json remotes URL references an undefined template variable

lifecycle.rationale: Checks server.json remotes[] URL templates against variables defined on the same remote entry.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ServerJsonSignals placeholder extraction over remotes[] URLs compared with remotes[].variables keys.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: server.json remotes header commits literal authentication material

lifecycle.rationale: Checks remotes[].headers[] auth-like values for literal bearer/basic material or literal API key style values.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ServerJsonSignals inspects remotes[].headers[] auth-like names and value literals without looking at packages[].transport.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: server.json remotes header value references an undefined template variable

lifecycle.rationale: Checks auth-like remotes[].headers[].value placeholders against variables defined on the same header object.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ServerJsonSignals placeholder extraction over remotes[].headers[].value compared with headers[].variables keys.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: server.json auth: missing explicit secret flag
rules.summary: server.json auth header carries material without an explicit secret flag

lifecycle.blocker: Secret policy expectations can vary across registry producers, so the first release keeps this as guidance-only.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, external usefulness evidence, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural preview rule; deterministic today, but the preview contract may still evolve.

rules.summary: GitHub Actions workflow uses a third-party action that is not pinned to a full commit SHA

lifecycle.rationale: Checks workflow uses: entries for third-party actions that rely on mutable refs instead of immutable commit SHAs; positioned as a supply-chain hardening control rather than a direct exploit claim.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: GithubWorkflowSignals line-level uses: extraction gated by semantically confirmed workflow YAML.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule positioned as a supply-chain hardening control: high-precision and actionable, but not a blanket claim of direct repository compromise.

rules.docTitle: GitHub Actions: untrusted expression in run
rules.summary: GitHub Actions workflow interpolates untrusted expression data directly inside a run command

lifecycle.blocker: Shell safety depends on how the interpolated expression is consumed inside the run command.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, external usefulness evidence, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural preview rule; deterministic today, but the preview contract may still evolve.

rules.summary: GitHub Actions pull_request_target workflow checks out untrusted pull request head content

lifecycle.rationale: Checks pull_request_target workflows for actions/checkout steps that explicitly pull untrusted pull request head refs instead of the safer default merge context.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: GithubWorkflowSignals event gating plus line-level checkout ref extraction for pull_request_target workflows.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: GitHub Actions workflow grants GITHUB_TOKEN write-all permissions

lifecycle.rationale: Checks workflow permissions for the explicit write-all shortcut, which exceeds least-privilege guidance for GITHUB_TOKEN.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: GithubWorkflowSignals line-level permissions extraction for semantically confirmed workflow YAML.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: GitHub Actions workflow combines explicit write-capable permissions with a third-party action

lifecycle.blocker: Write-capable token scopes and third-party action usage are compositional and need more corpus-backed precision review before a stable launch.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, external usefulness evidence, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural preview rule; deterministic today, but the preview contract may still evolve.

rules.summary: MCP configuration launches tooling through a mutable package runner

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed MCP config command launchers for mutable package-runner forms such as npx, uvx, pnpm dlx, yarn dlx, and pipx run.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals command/args analysis over ArtifactKind::McpConfig objects with launcher-specific argument gating.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: MCP config: remote content piped to shell
rules.summary: MCP configuration command downloads remote content and pipes it into a shell

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed MCP config command and args values for explicit curl|shell or wget|shell execution chains.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals command/args string analysis over ArtifactKind::McpConfig objects, limited to explicit download-pipe-shell patterns.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: MCP configuration command disables TLS verification in a network-capable execution path

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed MCP config command and args values for explicit TLS-bypass tokens in a network-capable execution context.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals command/args string analysis over ArtifactKind::McpConfig objects gated by network markers plus TLS-bypass tokens.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: AI-native markdown contains a direct cloud metadata-service access example

lifecycle.blocker: Metadata-service examples can appear in legitimate security training content, so the first release stays guidance-only.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, external usefulness evidence, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural preview rule; deterministic today, but the preview contract may still evolve.

rules.summary: Repo-local MCP client config loads a broad dotenv-style envFile

lifecycle.blocker: Broad envFile loading is useful review signal, but whether it is materially risky still depends on repo-local review policy and env contents.
lifecycle.promotionRequirements: Needs corpus-backed precision review, external usefulness evidence, and completed stable checklist metadata.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural preview rule; deterministic today, but the preview contract may still evolve.

rules.docTitle: MCP config: Docker image not digest-pinned
rules.summary: MCP configuration launches Docker with an image reference that is not digest-pinned

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed MCP config Docker launch paths for image references that are not pinned by digest, including tag-only refs such as :latest or :1.2.3.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals docker run argument analysis over ArtifactKind::McpConfig objects, limited to command == docker plus args beginning with run.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: MCP config: sensitive host bind mount
rules.summary: MCP configuration launches Docker with a bind mount of sensitive host material

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed MCP config Docker launch paths for bind mounts of sensitive host sources such as docker.sock, SSH material, cloud credentials, and kubeconfig directories.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals docker run argument analysis over ArtifactKind::McpConfig objects, limited to -v/--volume and --mount bind forms with sensitive host-path markers.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: MCP configuration launches Docker with a host-escape or privileged runtime flag

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed MCP config Docker launch paths for privileged or host-escape runtime flags such as --privileged, --network host, --pid host, and --ipc host.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals docker run argument analysis over ArtifactKind::McpConfig objects, limited to explicit privileged and host namespace flags.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Claude settings command hook uses a mutable package launcher

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed Claude settings command hooks for mutable package launcher forms such as npx, uvx, pnpm dlx, yarn dlx, and pipx run.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ClaudeSettingsSignals command-hook analysis over committed .claude/settings.json or claude/settings.json objects with type == command under hooks.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: Claude hook: remote content piped to shell
rules.summary: Claude settings command hook downloads remote content and pipes it into a shell

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed Claude settings command hooks for explicit curl|shell or wget|shell execution chains.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ClaudeSettingsSignals command-hook string analysis over committed hook entries with type == command, limited to explicit download-pipe-shell patterns.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Claude settings command hook disables TLS verification in a network-capable execution path

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed Claude settings command hooks for explicit TLS-bypass tokens in a network-capable execution context.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: ClaudeSettingsSignals command-hook string analysis over committed hook entries with type == command, gated by network markers plus TLS-bypass tokens.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Plugin hook command uses a mutable package launcher

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed plugin hook command values for mutable package launchers such as npx, uvx, pnpm dlx, yarn dlx, and pipx run.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals command-string analysis over ArtifactKind::CursorPluginHooks objects limited to actual hook command values.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.docTitle: Plugin hook: remote content piped to shell
rules.summary: Plugin hook command downloads remote content and pipes it into a shell

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed plugin hook command values for explicit curl|shell or wget|shell execution chains.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals command-string analysis over ArtifactKind::CursorPluginHooks objects, limited to explicit download-pipe-shell patterns.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: Plugin hook command disables TLS verification in a network-capable execution path

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed plugin hook command values for explicit TLS-bypass tokens in a network-capable execution context.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals command-string analysis over ArtifactKind::CursorPluginHooks objects gated by network markers plus TLS-bypass tokens.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.

rules.summary: MCP configuration forces Docker to refresh from a mutable registry source

lifecycle.rationale: Checks committed MCP config Docker launch paths for explicit --pull always refresh policies that force a mutable registry fetch at runtime.
lifecycle.deterministicSignalBasis: JsonSignals docker run argument analysis over ArtifactKind::McpConfig objects, limited to explicit --pull=always or --pull always forms.

rules.canonicalNote: Structural stable rule intended as a high-precision check with deterministic evidence.
